title: LatAm crude exports face temporary slowdown
section_path: LatAm crude exports face temporary slowdown
section_path_text: LatAm crude exports face temporary slowdown
summary:
Main
LatAm crude exports are facing a temporary slowdown in early-2026 but we expect a rebound going forward which we explore in this insight piece. By Rohit Rathod
LatAm crude/condensate exports showed exceptional strength last year, setting seasonal highs for 10 months of the year. As new production came online in Guyana (FPSO One Guyana producing 250kbd) these exports also set a record high during 2H 2025.

children.title: Main
children.summary:
LatAm crude exports are facing a temporary slowdown in early-2026 but we expect a rebound going forward which we explore in this insight piece. By Rohit Rathod
LatAm crude/condensate exports showed exceptional strength last year, setting seasonal highs for 10 months of the year.

children.title: Seasonal highs despite m-o-m declines
children.summary:
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2026-02-12 101352.png | assets/2026-02-12_latam-crude-exports-face-temporary-slowdown_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_b5d992be4304.png
Even though January-2026 saw m-o-m declines as mentioned above, it did set a new seasonal high for LatAm crude exports driven by Guyana which saw record high exports and small m-o-m growth in exports from Colombia. All other producing countries reflected a decline in exports.

children.title: Barrels head to India as refiners look to diversify
section_path: Barrels head to India as refiners look to diversify
children.section_path_text: Barrels head to India as refiners look to diversify
children.summary:
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2026-02-12 101512.png | assets/2026-02-12_latam-crude-exports-face-temporary-slowdown_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_05dcc61776c8.png
Even with all these issues mentioned above, LatAm crude exports to Asia crossed the 2mbd mark in 2H 2025. Asia remains the logical destination for growing production out of the region and most exports have mainly headed towards China.
